creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-06-08 22:51:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/rubygem-feedzirra Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Feedzirra is a feed library that is designed to get
  and update many feeds as quickly as possible.
  
  The fetching and parsing logic have been de-coupled
  so that either of them can be used in isolation if you'd
  prefer not to use everything that Feedzirra offers.
  
  WWW: http://github.com/pauldix/feedzirra
  
  PR:             ports/147693
  Submitted by:   Eric Freeman <freebsdports at chillibear.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2635    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/www/rubygem-feedzirra/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/rubygem-feedzirra/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/www/rubygem-feedzirra/pkg-descr (new)
